pageContext.name: Mega Man X
pageContext.description: X possesses great risks as well as great possibilities. I can only hope for the best.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Mega Man X 1:4 Scale Statue, a futuristic video game collectible celebrating the classic Capcom character.  The Collector's Edition Mega Man X 1:4 Scale Statue measures 17 tall and 10 wide, standing on a sleek black statue base. As one of the Maverick Hunters, Mega Man X is a technologically advanced Reploid capable of independent thinking and feeling. This detailed statue showcases X's unique construction, with unarmored silver limbs as well as the iconic blue armor that gives the hero his distinctive silhouette. His expression is one of determination in the fight against criminal Reploids, known as Mavericks. Metallic blue paint and red accents complete Mega Man X's intricate robotic look to make this a striking display on any shelf.   Protect the future and bring home the Mega Man X 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today!
